description: For the 'Decision Rationale' data element under Initial Determinations (I.A. Coverage Decisions and I.B. Payment Decisions), the numerical prefixes (e.g., '01 - ') will be removed, and only the descriptive reason (e.g., 'Cost Sharing/Benefit Limits') will be reported.

For the 'Decision Rationale' data element under Reconsiderations (II.A. Coverage Decisions and II.B. Payment Decisions), the numerical prefixes (e.g., '01 - ') will be removed, and only the descriptive reason (e.g., 'Cost Sharing/Benefit Limits') will be reported.

mapped_term: Isolated Part C Reporting (No Prior Auth or Service Level Data)
description: Ensure that the Medicare Part C Reporting is kept strictly separate from prior authorization metrics and service level data collection reports.
